headline: Citigroup Maintains Buy on Delta Air Lines, Raises Price Target to $106
summary: Citigroup  analyst John Godyn   maintains Delta Air Lines (NYSE:DAL) with a Buy and raises the price target from $79 to $106.

headline: Delta Air Lines: Bracing For A Potential Q2 Earnings Miss And Light Q3 Guidance
summary: Delta Air Lines (DAL) stock is up 31% YTD but looks expensive. Q2 and Q3 earnings face headwinds from elevated fuel costs. Read here for more analysis.
